FoodItem.title: FoodItem
FoodItem.description: Represents a food dish from the restaurant menu.

name.description: The name of the food item

description.description: Description of ingredients and serving info

category.description: The menu category (e.g., Biryani, Fast Food)

ElectricianService.title: ElectricianService
ElectricianService.description: Represents a electrical trade repair service that can be booked.

name.description: The name of the electrician service

category.description: The category of electrical work (e.g., AC, Fans)

Order.title: Order
Order.description: Represents a customer's order for food or electrician trade services.

SystemSetting.title: SystemSetting
SystemSetting.description: System configuration values like dynamic delivery fee.

amount.description: The current delivery fee in PKR

food_items.description: The restaurant food menu items available for order.

electrician_services.description: The tradesperson electrical services available for booking.

orders.description: The customer orders containing item lists and status tracker.

settings.description: General settings stored in key-document format.
